title: Tweaked Trials
description: A few tweaks to Tricky Trials update, including repeatedly openable vaults and entity particles
body:
# Tweaked Trials
This mod adds new features to the Trial Chambers, one quality of life to the trial spawners and one small tweak to the way vaults work.
## Trial Spawner
The entity that spins within the spawner is now always visible, even in cooldown, albeit spinning at a slower rate than the inactive spin. Changable with config.

When a trial spawner is active, entities will occasionally give off a path of particles leading back to the spawner, so you can have an easier time trying to locate that one cave spider that wandered into the corner of a distant room (I am not joking, it took me ten minutes to find that accursed arachnid). Changable with config.
## Vaults
Whenever you unlock a vault, you can never reopen it again. On multiplayer servers, this seems like a good idea, but in singleplayer worlds, they simply become accent pieces to a structure you never really return to. Now you can reopen vaults after a configurable cooldown depending on your perfered wishes!
